description: Known sprite locations in Kirby Super Star (USA) ROM
source: Various debugging sessions and community documentation
note: These addresses should be verified with Mesen 2 tracing

sprites.name: Kirby (Main Graphics Bank)
sprites.notes: Large graphics bank containing Kirby sprites - 42KB decompressed

sprites.name: Pack Table Entry 0x00
sprites.notes: First pack table entry - 1,164 bytes (corrected SNES address)

sprites.name: Pack Table Entry 0x4E (Invalid)
sprites.notes: WARNING: This offset returns 0 bytes - not valid HAL compressed data

sprites.name: Placeholder for Cappy
sprites.notes: To be found using Mesen 2 tracing method

pack_table.notes: Master table of compressed graphics packs

decompression_routine.notes: JSL to this address decompresses HAL data
